# Contributors

This project is community-driven. Thank you to everyone who has shipped examples, fixes, and new topics.

> Contributors are listed automatically when a community example or path lands. To self-add a row, include your handle in the `contributedBy` field of your example or path manifest.

## Maintainers

- The Microsoft AI-Native Dev tutorial team

## How attribution works

| Where you contributed | How you're credited |
|---|---|
| Example project | `contributedBy: '@yourhandle'` on your `ExampleTrack` entry shows on the Examples page card |
| Community path | `contributedBy` in your `path.json` shows on the path's catalog card and lesson banner |
| Fixes & refreshes | Standard GitHub commit attribution |
| New official path | Listed in this file under maintainers when promoted |

See [.github/CONTENT_LIFECYCLE.md](.github/CONTENT_LIFECYCLE.md) for how community contributions get promoted.
